augmenting_source: plugins/sgs-blocks/src/blocks/<slug>/save.js direct inspection (catches hybrid blocks classified as dynamic by sgs-db but emitting serialised wrapper)

rejected_source.reason: frozen v1-recogniser artifact; block_type field stale (testimonial + whatsapp-cta migrated to dynamic 2026-05-05 but FP not updated; tab classification incorrect; feature-grid + multi-button not in FP at all). No script maintains it.

fr12_semantic: snapshot-needed = save.js returns non-null JSX (whether sgs_db marks block static or dynamic)
